title: Food Stuff
description: A resource pack adding new foods and edible commodities!
body:
![Kokko & SC4's Food Stuff showing off a bunch of item textures and models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de1a8ffa00c8f2c11ea3674432fe7d49039a38de.png)

---

**Food Stuff** is a **Resoruce Pack** that adds item models of foods to be added onto your items to make them look delicious!

And there is also a **[DataPack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/food-stuff-recipes)** with recipes for baking and cooking those delicious foods into any world of your choice; they have different saturation and nutrition levels and even hidden effects for each special food you make!

---

To set the models to your foods with custom components you just have to add this component: `[item_model:"foodstuff:name-of-the-food"]`
